steps.title: Find Maya's weekly savings
steps.content:
Maya saves $\frac{4}{5}$ of $230 per week. Calculate her weekly savings:
$$\text{Weekly savings} = \frac{4}{5} \times 230 = \frac{920}{5} = 184$$
Maya saves $184 each week.

steps.title: Multiply by 3 weeks
steps.content:
To find total savings over 3 weeks, multiply the weekly amount by 3:
$$184 \times 3 = 552$$
Maya will save $552 in 3 weeks.
